g.title: acq.distribution_formula_entry:formula->acq.distribution_formula:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (formula) REFERENCES acq.distribution_formula(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.distribution_formula_entry:owning_lib->actor.org_unit:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (owning_lib) REFERENCES actor.org_unit(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
